The Autumn 2026 semester lectures begin on 27 July 2026 [Source 1].
The last date for course adjustment in the Autumn 2026 semester is 3 August 2026 (Monday) [Source 1, Source 2].
The end-semester examinations for the Spring 2027 semester are scheduled from 19 April 2027 (Monday) to 1 May 2027 (Saturday) [Source 4].

The minimum eligibility criterion for the Interdisciplinary Dual Degree Programme (IDDDP) is a CPI >= 7.5 at the end of the sixth semester [Source 1, Source 2, Source 6]. 

Please note that individual academic units may enforce additional eligibility and selection criteria [Source 1, Source 6]. For
Undergraduate students admitted to B.S., B.Tech., and DD (B.Tech. + M.Tech.) programmes can apply for the IDDDP at the end of the sixth semester [Source 1], [Source 4], [Source 5].

The Dr. Shankar Dayal Sharma Gold Medal is awarded to the most outstanding student in terms of general proficiency, excellence in academic performance, extracurricular activities, and social services among all graduating students [Source 3].

The provided documents do not list the specific names or types of academic prizes available to undergraduate students, other than mentioning that there is a section for "Academic Prizes awarded to On-Roll students" in the "Rules for Award of Medals and Academic prizes for UG & PG" [Source 5].
